about.title: About
about.bio: Java / C# developer, passionate about open source and tech sharing.
about.timelineItem1Desc: Developed various software and systems based on personal interest (Minecraft). Practiced frameworks like Flutter, Qt, WPF, and learned languages including Dart, C++, C#, and Go.
about.timelineItem2Desc: Began systematically learning Java Spring ecosystem and JavaFX framework, developing web systems and desktop applications.
about.timelineItem3Desc: Started exploring how to create mods with MDK, and joined a programming club to learn C++ fundamentals.
about.timelineItem4Title: First Touch with Code & Server Plugins
about.timelineItem4Desc: From tweaking config files to getting hands-on with Java code for server plugins.
about.timelineItem5Desc: Discovered Minecraft, which sparked a love for this open world and ignited an interest in programming.

forum.tagline: A community forum for Minecraft players
forum.subTagline: A full-stack forum system built with Vue 3 + Spring Boot, a clean and efficient open-source community solution
forum.introDesc: StarFall-Minecraft-Forum is a community forum system designed specifically for Minecraft players. The frontend is built with Vue 3 + TypeScript, and the backend is developed with Spring Boot, implementing a modern frontend-backend separation architecture. The system provides core features such as forum post management, user system, comment interaction, message notifications, and search functionality, providing a quality platform for Minecraft players to exchange ideas and share experiences.
forum.frontendDesc: StarFall-vue is the frontend part of the project, built with Vue 3 + TypeScript, using Element Plus component library to provide a modern user interface and smooth interactive experience.
forum.backendDesc: StarFall-SpringBoot is the backend part of the project, developed with Spring Boot framework, using MySQL database for data storage, providing RESTful API interface services.

forum.title: Forum Management
forum.desc: Board classification, post publishing, sticky highlights, permission control and other complete forum features

user.title: User System
user.desc: User registration and login, personal profile, avatar and nickname, points and levels and other social features

post.title: Post System
post.desc: Rich text editor, image upload, Markdown support, draft saving and other content creation features

comment.title: Comment Interaction
comment.desc: Comment replies, likes and favorites and other interactive features to promote community communication

notification.title: Notifications
notification.desc: System notifications, private messages, comment reply reminders and other real-time messaging features

search.title: Search
search.desc: Full-text search, keyword highlighting, filtering and sorting and other efficient content retrieval features
